name: dragontail
description: Dragontail Terminal — A DND 5e tabletop RPG companion with retro fantasy terminal aesthetics

scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../gm-client && npm install && cd ../player-client && npm install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run gm-client" "npm run player-client"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../gm-client && npm run build && cd ../player-client && npm run build
